etymology.description: The term 乌鲁木齐市 (烏魯木齊市) (Wūlǔmùqí Shì, 'Urumqi city') refers to the capital city of the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region in China. The name originates from the Dzungar Oirat language, meaning 'beautiful pasture.' It is a transliteration of the original name, adapted into Chinese characters. The characters 乌(烏) (wū, 'crow'), 鲁(魯) (lǔ, 'clumsy'), 木(木) (mù, 'wood'), 齐(齊) (qí, 'neat'), and 市(市) (shì, 'city') were chosen primarily for their phonetic values rather than their individual meanings in this context.
etymology.interpretation: 乌鲁木齐 (烏魯木齊) (Wūlǔmùqí, 'Urumqi') is a transliteration of a place name from the Dzungar Oirat language, meaning 'beautiful pasture,' chosen for its phonetic resemblance. 市 (市) (shì, 'city') indicates Urumqi's status as a city.

examples.chinese: 乌鲁木齐市是新疆的首府(烏魯木齊市是新疆的首府)。
examples.pinyin: Wūlǔmùqí Shì shì Xīnjiāng de shǒufǔ.
examples.english: Urumqi is the capital of Xinjiang.

examples.chinese: 乌鲁木齐市的夜市非常热闹(烏魯木齊市的夜市非常熱鬧)。
examples.pinyin: Wūlǔmùqí Shì de yèshì fēicháng rènào.
examples.english: The night market in Urumqi is very lively.

examples.chinese: 我计划去乌鲁木齐市旅行(我計劃去烏魯木齊市旅行)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ jìhuà qù Wūlǔmùqí Shì lǚxíng.
examples.english: I plan to travel to Urumqi.
